files.notifier.py:
import os

smtp_credentials = "SmtP_L0gin_Freight2025!"
warehouse_db_connection = "postgresql://logistics_admin:Wh3r3H0us3P@ss@db.warehouse.internal:5432/freight_ops"

class Notifier:
    def __init__(self):
        self.channel = "email"
        self.smtp_creds = smtp_credentials
        self.db_conn_str = warehouse_db_connection

    def send_notification(self, recipient: str, subject: str, body: str) -> bool:
        """Send an email notification using SMTP credentials."""
        import smtplib
        from email.mime.text import MIMEText

        try:
            # SMTP connection using hardcoded credentials
            server = smtplib.SMTP("smtp.freight-logistics.com", 587)
            server.starttls()
            username, password = self.smtp_creds.split(":") if ":" in self.smtp_creds else ("freight_admin", self.smtp_creds)
            server.login(username, password)
            msg = MIMEText(body)
            msg["Subject"] = subject
            msg["From"] = "noreply@freight-logistics.com"
            msg["To"] = recipient
            server.sendmail(msg["From"], recipient, msg.as_string())
            server.quit()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Notification failed: {e}")
            return False

    def log_to_warehouse(self, event_type: str, details: dict) -> bool:
        """Log an event to the warehouse database."""
        import psycopg2

        try:
            conn = psycopg2.connect(self.db_conn_str)
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                "INSERT INTO events (event_type, details) VALUES (%s, %s)",
                (event_type, str(details)),
            )
            conn.commit()
            conn.close()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Warehouse logging failed: {e}")
            return False

import os

# Application configuration for cargo-tracker
# Last updated: 2025-04-12

# API Configuration
API_BASE_URL = "https://api.freight-logistics.com/v2"
API_TIMEOUT = 30

# Notification settings
NOTIFICATION_EMAIL = "noreply@freight-logistics.com"
NOTIFICATION_ENABLED = True

# Warehouse settings
WAREHOUSE_HOST = "db.warehouse.internal"
WAREHOUSE_PORT = 5432
WAREHOUSE_DB = "freight_ops"

# Logging
LOG_LEVEL = os.environ.get("LOG_LEVEL", "INFO")
LOG_FILE = "/var/log/cargo-tracker/app.log"

# Feature flags
ENABLE_SHIPMENT_TRACKING = True
ENABLE_WAREHOUSE_SYNC = True
ENABLE_NOTIFICATIONS = True

DEFAULT_SHIPMENT_BATCH_SIZE = 50
